purpose: Sector-specific if/then rules. Auto-flag findings in DD §5-§7. Each rule = principal's encoded intuition: 'if metric crosses threshold, escalate as red flag and investigate per follow-up'.
usage: After data collection for DD §3-§7, the system iterates over rules and prints all triggered red flags into a 'Red Flags Summary' that feeds into §11 Recommendations.

aluminium_smelter.title: Current efficiency declining trend
aluminium_smelter.implication: Anode quality, bath chemistry, or cell instability. Compounds over time. Energy consumption rises, productivity falls.
investigate: Anode S, V, dust content trend over same period
Bath AlF₃ excess and cryolite ratio control
Anode effect frequency (proxy for cell instability)
Did the asset switch alumina or coke supplier in the period?
aluminium_smelter.dd_action: Quantify $/t cost impact and persistence. Frame in CapEx ask for remediation.

aluminium_smelter.title: Specific energy consumption above benchmark with no improvement path
aluminium_smelter.condition: kWh_per_kg_Al > 14.0 AND no announced energy reduction program
aluminium_smelter.implication: Asset is high on global cost curve. Vulnerable to LME downturns. Likely cell technology obsolescence.
aluminium_smelter.dd_action: Quantify cost-curve position deterioration risk over 5y. Estimate retrofit CapEx for cell line.

aluminium_smelter.title: Pot age concentration risk
aluminium_smelter.implication: Imminent CapEx wave masked by aggregate CapEx framing. Risk of forced potline shutdown if relining capacity insufficient.
investigate: In-house cathode lining capacity vs need
Past relining duration per pot trend
aluminium_smelter.dd_action: Quantify deferred CapEx ($200-600K per pot × applicable count). Negotiate price reduction.

aluminium_smelter.title: Spent potlining stockpile without disposal route
aluminium_smelter.implication: Hazardous waste legacy. Tightening regulation can crystallise treatment obligation into mandatory CapEx within 2-5 years.
investigate: Comparable jurisdiction treatment routes and unit cost
aluminium_smelter.dd_action: Treatment cost $200-500/t. Calculate full liability. Confirm provisioning in financials.

aluminium_smelter.title: Power tariff sensitivity above C1 break-even at stress case
aluminium_smelter.implication: Asset cash-loss at plausible downside. Power contract structure is deal-defining.
investigate: PPA renewal terms and merchant exposure
aluminium_smelter.dd_action: Run base/upside/downside power scenarios. Position on cost-curve in each.

aluminium_smelter.title: Carbon intensity vs EU export book
aluminium_smelter.implication: CBAM cost imposition material. Customer pressure for carbon disclosure rising.
investigate: EU customer contract structure (long-term vs spot)
aluminium_smelter.dd_action: Model CBAM cost across phase-in. Reduce EU export book value.

aluminium_smelter.title: Anode plant capacity bottleneck vs potline expansion
aluminium_smelter.implication: Hidden CapEx for anode plant expansion typically $1500-2500/t. Often missing from announced expansion CapEx.
investigate: Pet coke supply contract structure for expansion
aluminium_smelter.dd_action: Add anode plant CapEx to total expansion cost.

aluminium_smelter.title: Process safety incident pattern
aluminium_smelter.implication: Operational culture issue. Fatality risk. Insurance and regulator exposure.
investigate: Event log with root cause and corrective action status
External safety audit reports if any
aluminium_smelter.dd_action: Walk-away trigger if multiple fatalities without remediation. Otherwise price for HSE upgrade CapEx.

aluminium_smelter.title: Captive workforce skill pipeline drying up
aluminium_smelter.implication: Many Russian/Indian/Canadian smelters in single-asset towns. Workforce dependency on local schools. 10y workforce risk.
aluminium_smelter.dd_action: Quantify operational risk over 10y. Possible discount factor on terminal value.

aluminium_smelter.title: Sanctions cascade risk through ownership chain
aluminium_smelter.implication: Secondary sanctions can capture buyer downstream from acquisition. Risk grows with regulatory tightening.
investigate: Past designation history for chain entities
aluminium_smelter.dd_action: Independent sanctions counsel engagement. Walk-away if material exposure.

copper_concentrator.title: Recovery declining despite stable feed grade
copper_concentrator.implication: Throughput pushed beyond mill design at coarser grind, or flotation circuit overloaded. Stable trend = ore-driven; declining = ops-driven.

copper_concentrator.title: TSF stewardship gap
copper_concentrator.implication: Post-Brumadinho institutional bar. Upstream construction TSFs in seismic zones are de-facto un-financeable for many buyers.
investigate: TSF construction type and seismic exposure

copper_concentrator.title: Concentrate offtake concentration
copper_concentrator.implication: TC/RC pricing power asymmetry. Single-smelter dependency for landlocked assets.

nickel_pgm.title: SO₂ capture regulatory gap
nickel_pgm.implication: Mandatory CapEx for emission control within 5-7y. Sulphuric acid market for captured S adds further complexity.

nickel_pgm.title: PGM offtake disadvantageous structure
nickel_pgm.implication: PGM credits 20-40% of revenue for some nickel projects. Refining-at-third-party structures can leak 20-40% of credit value.

gold_hydromet.title: Inferred resource share excessive
gold_hydromet.implication: Inferred resources are not bankable. Pricing deal on resource curve implies optimistic conversion assumption.

gold_hydromet.title: Tailings retreatment testwork inadequate
gold_hydromet.implication: Aged tailings recovery 35-55% vs fresh ore 75-90%. Project IRR sensitivity to this assumption is dominant.
investigate: Carbon loading kinetics on aged feed

gold_hydromet.title: Cyanide detox capacity stress-test deficit
gold_hydromet.implication: Detox often sized for nominal throughput, not stress events. Cyanide release events have regulatory and reputational consequences.

cross_sector.title: FEL stage misrepresentation
cross_sector.implication: Vendor claiming FEL 3 accuracy on FEL 2-stage scope. Estimate will move 15-30% during true FEL 3.
cross_sector.dd_action: Adjust CapEx central estimate upward by 15-20%. Adjust contingency upward.

cross_sector.title: Deferred maintenance signal
cross_sector.implication: Below 3% sustained = deferred maintenance. Catch-up CapEx typically 2-3y of normal annual spend.

cross_sector.title: Single-source critical dependency
cross_sector.implication: Single-source for anode, reagents, energy components, OEM spares. Diversification CapEx may be required.

cross_sector.title: Closure provisioning gap
cross_sector.implication: Closure obligation under-provisioned. Reserve adjustment will flow through equity at acquisition.

cross_sector.title: Vendor refusal of standard DD documents under NDA
cross_sector.condition: PPA OR offtake OR resource_statement OR audit_letters not_shared_under_signed_NDA
cross_sector.implication: Active DD requires document disclosure under NDA. Refusal indicates either material adverse information or unprofessional process. Either is walk-away signal.

scoring_to_recommendations.high_severity_count_above_2: Walk-away or material price reduction required.
scoring_to_recommendations.medium_severity_count_above_4: Caution. Price for risk and embed in deal structure (earn-outs, escrows, reps and warranties).
